name: RV-030 Worm Gearbox
shortDescription: Compact aluminum worm gearbox ideal for light-duty automation and packaging machinery.
description: The RV-030 is a high-efficiency worm gear reducer featuring a precision-machined aluminum alloy housing. Designed for smooth, quiet operation with minimal maintenance requirements. Ideal for conveyor systems, packaging machines, and light automation equipment.

name: RV-050 Worm Gearbox
shortDescription: Medium-duty worm gear reducer with excellent torque output for industrial automation.
description: The RV-050 delivers reliable performance for medium-duty industrial applications. Featuring a robust die-cast aluminum housing and hardened steel worm gear set, this reducer provides excellent torque multiplication with compact dimensions.
features: Double oil seals for leak prevention
Wide ratio range for versatile applications

name: RV-075 Worm Gearbox
shortDescription: Heavy-duty worm reducer for demanding industrial environments with high torque capacity.
description: The RV-075 is designed for heavy-duty applications requiring high output torque and reliable continuous operation. Features cast iron housing option for enhanced durability in harsh environments. Suitable for mining, construction, and heavy industrial machinery.

name: RV-110 Worm Gearbox
shortDescription: Extra-large worm reducer for maximum torque in heavy industrial processes.
description: The RV-110 represents the top of our worm gear reducer range, delivering maximum torque for the most demanding applications. Built with premium materials and precision manufacturing, it ensures years of trouble-free operation in continuous duty cycles.

name: R-17 Helical Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Compact inline helical gearbox with up to 97% efficiency for precision drives.
description: The R-17 inline helical gear reducer offers superior efficiency and compact design. Featuring hardened and ground helical gears, it delivers smooth, quiet power transmission with minimal backlash. Perfect for applications requiring precise speed control.

name: R-37 Helical Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Medium-power inline helical reducer with 2/3-stage options for flexible speed ratios.
description: The R-37 is a versatile inline helical gear reducer with 2-stage and 3-stage configurations for a wide ratio range. Engineered for continuous heavy-duty operation with excellent thermal performance and low maintenance requirements.

name: R-67 Helical Gear Reducer
shortDescription: High-power helical gear unit for heavy industrial machinery requiring maximum reliability.
description: The R-67 is our premium heavy-duty inline helical gear reducer. Designed for the most challenging industrial environments, it delivers exceptional reliability and torque capacity. Features advanced sealing and lubrication systems for extended maintenance intervals.

name: K-37 Helical Bevel Gearbox
seriesName: K Series Helical Bevel Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Right-angle helical bevel gearbox with high efficiency and compact right-angle design.
description: The K-37 helical bevel right-angle gearbox combines spiral bevel gears with helical gearing for smooth, efficient right-angle power transmission. Ideal for applications where space constraints require a 90° driven shaft orientation.

name: K-57 Helical Bevel Gearbox
seriesName: K Series Helical Bevel Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Medium-duty right-angle bevel gearbox for versatile industrial power transmission.
description: The K-57 offers excellent versatility with its right-angle power transmission capability. The precision-machined spiral bevel gear stage ensures smooth engagement and minimal noise, while the helical stages provide high efficiency and torque capacity.

name: K-87 Helical Bevel Gearbox
seriesName: K Series Helical Bevel Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Heavy-duty helical bevel unit for large-scale right-angle drive systems.
description: The K-87 is our heavy-duty right-angle helical bevel gear unit designed for demanding applications requiring high torque at 90° output. Built for continuous operation in challenging industrial environments with excellent reliability.

name: F-27 Parallel Shaft Gearbox
seriesName: F Series Parallel Shaft Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Compact parallel shaft helical gearbox for space-saving installations.
description: The F-27 parallel shaft gear reducer offers a compact solution for applications where space is at a premium. The helical gear design ensures smooth, quiet operation with high efficiency. The parallel shaft configuration allows flexible installation options.

name: F-47 Parallel Shaft Gearbox
seriesName: F Series Parallel Shaft Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Versatile parallel shaft reducer with hollow shaft option for direct machine mounting.
description: The F-47 is a versatile parallel shaft gear reducer suitable for a wide range of industrial applications. Available with hollow shaft output for direct mounting onto driven shafts, eliminating the need for couplings and reducing installation complexity.

name: F-77 Parallel Shaft Gearbox
seriesName: F Series Parallel Shaft Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Heavy-duty parallel shaft gearbox for high-power industrial drive systems.
description: The F-77 is a high-power parallel shaft gear reducer designed for heavy-duty applications. Featuring a robust cast iron housing and precision gear sets, it delivers exceptional performance and reliability in demanding operating conditions.

name: S-37 Helical Worm Gearbox
seriesName: S Series Helical Worm Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Helical-worm combination gearbox offering high ratios with improved efficiency over pure worm designs.
description: The S-37 combines a helical first stage with a worm gear second stage, delivering higher efficiency and wider ratio range compared to pure worm reducers. The helical input stage improves overall efficiency while the worm stage provides compact right-angle output with self-locking capability.

name: S-57 Helical Worm Gearbox
seriesName: S Series Helical Worm Gear Reducer
shortDescription: Medium-heavy helical worm gearbox with high ratio capability for precise low-speed applications.
description: The S-57 is built for applications requiring very high reduction ratios in a single compact unit. The helical-worm combination provides an excellent balance of efficiency, torque capacity, and self-locking performance for precise speed control applications.
